use_codes.desc: METHOD OF ADMINISTRATION OF CONTROLLED RELEASE OXYMORPHONE

indications.text:
OPANA ER is indicated for the management of pain severe enough to require daily, around-the-clock, long-term opioid treatment and
for which alternative treatment options are inadequate.
Limitations of Use
• Because of the risks of addiction, abuse, and misuse with opioids, even at recommended doses,...
